results.title: Creatify: The AI Video Ad Maker
results.content:
What impressed me most about AI Media Buyer is that it goes far beyond dashboards. It helps turn data into actionable decisions. From performance analysis and strategy recommendations to creative generation and optimization, it feels like a true AI co-worker rather than just another AI tool.

I’ve been fortunate to see this product evolve from the early days, helping refine the ads strategies behind it. Today, the quality of its recommendations is genuinely impressive, and it’s already become part of our internal workflow.

I truly believe AI Media Buyer is changing how paid advertising gets done. The future isn’t AI replacing marketers—it’s AI and marketers making better decisions together.

Huge congratulations to the Creatify team on the launch! 🚀

This is the 5th launch from Creatify. View more

## AI Media Buyer By Creatify

Launching today

Your ads, managed by AI that gets smarter daily. [...] How it runs:

1. Connects to your Meta, Google, and TikTok accounts (OpenAI ad accounts too now 🤫). Reads every campaign, finds what's scaling and what's quietly bleeding spend.
2. It doesn't just alert you. It acts recommends what to cut, what to scale, and can generate new creatives from your winners and launch them in one loop.
3. It remembers your account and past conversations. Recommendations compound the more you use it.
4. Cross-references your ad data with Stripe and CRM, so you see real numbers, not just Meta's attribution.

The part I'm most proud of: this is the only AI media buyer with a built in creative engine. Most tools stop at "here's what happened." Ours finds a winning hook, makes variations, and launches them. No other tool does that.

# Synthesia Reviews

### The community submitted 24 reviews to tell us what they like about Synthesia, what Synthesia can do better, and more.

Based on 24 reviews

Review Synthesia? [...] AI The core appeal of AI video platforms is to enable rapid creation of high-quality videos. Unfortunately, Synthesia’s policies and processes are the exact opposite, resulting in frustrating delays and inefficiencies. High Costs with Frequent Errors The platform’s pricing is exorbitantly high, with subscription plans starting at a premium. To make matters worse, the platform frequently encounters errors, and videos often fail to render, stalling at 99% completion. This unreliability is unacceptable for a paid service.
